title: Optimus+
description: A lightweight FPS boost modpack for low-end PCs
body:
Optimus+ – The Ultimate FPS Boost Modpack!

Tired of lag? Meet Optimus+, a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack designed to squeeze out 100+ FPS even on low-end PCs!

✅ Optimized for performance without sacrificing vanilla feel
✅ Smooth gameplay with better visuals and lighting
✅ Lightweight, clean, and stable – perfect for laptops & older systems
✅ Explore, build, and fight with less stutter and more fun!

Optimus+: play smarter, run faster, and transform your Minecraft into a buttery-smooth experience.
